channel.title: World
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from World, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump raises tariffs to 15% on imports from all countries
item.description: President announced increase from 10% using different authority from mechanism that supreme court struck down on Friday Donald Trump announced on Satu...

item.title: US group allegedly ran fake law firm and court proceedings to scam immigrants
item.description: Federal prosecutors have arraigned four people in New Jersey, with a fifth at large in Colombia Four people were arraigned on Saturday in New Jersey f...

item.title: Iran refusing to export highly enriched uranium but willing to dilute purity, sources say
item.description: Proposal will be at heart of offer to US as Trump considers whether to attack Iran Iran is refusing to export its 300kg stockpile of highly enriched u...

item.title: At least five people killed in string of avalanches in Austria
item.description: Fatalities and injuries reported in avalanches across Tirol after prolonged snowfall and windy conditions At least five people have been killed in a s...

item.title: Nasa may roll back Artemis II rocket launch after helium flow discovery
item.description: Agency statement comes one day after announcement of 6 March target for astronautsâ mission to circle the moon Nasa said in a blog post on Saturday it...

item.title: Five taken to hospital after gas explosion at farm
item.description: All five are taken to hospital as a precaution following the incident, which involved a food truck.

item.title: Trump says he will increase his new global tariffs to 15%
item.description: After most of his tariffs were outlawed on Friday, Trump announced new global tariffs of 10% - which he says he has now increased to 15%.

item.title: Nasa astronauts' moon mission delayed due to rocket issue
item.description: The mission to the far side of the Moon and back will be postponed after problems with were spotted with its rocket, a Nasa official said.

item.title: What went wrong for England in nightmare defeat?
item.description: "Everyone has to take a look at themselves" - what went wrong for England in their record Six Nations home defeat by Ireland?

item.title: GB curlers denied Olympic gold at death yet again
item.description: Bruce Mouat's rink are unable to end a 102-year wait for a men's Winter Olympic curling gold - and vanquish their own disappointment from 2022 - as Ca...
